firstLabel: // n - named: n[true] or n[s:string] or n[e:string]
secondLabel: // n - named: n[true] or n[s:string] or n[e:string]

firstLabel: // w - windowCount: w[1-4] or w[1], optional flag t or f for tiled or floating and
secondLabel: // w - windowCount: w[1-4] or w[1], optional flag t or f for tiled or floating and

firstLabel: //                  flag p to count only pinned windows, e.g. w[p1-2], w[pg4]
secondLabel: //                  flag p to count only pinned windows, e.g. w[p1-2], w[pg4]

firstLabel: //                  flag g to count groups instead of windows, e.g. w[t1-2], w[fg4]
secondLabel: //                  flag g to count groups instead of windows, e.g. w[t1-2], w[fg4]

firstLabel: //                  flag v will count only visible windows
secondLabel: //                  flag v will count only visible windows

firstLabel: // f - fullscreen state : f[-1], f[0], f[1], or f[2] for different fullscreen states
secondLabel: // f - fullscreen state : f[-1], f[0], f[1], or f[2] for different fullscreen states

firstLabel: //                        -1: no fullscreen, 0: fullscreen, 1: maximized, 2: fullscreen without sending fs state to window
secondLabel: //                        -1: no fullscreen, 0: fullscreen, 1: maximized, 2: fullscreen without sending fs state to window
